title: Smart Factory APC AVEVA
subtitle: Advanced Process Control for Biopower Boilers
description: Vendor-licensed advanced process control across biopower boilers, delivering stable steam output and measurable fuel savings at production scale.

benefits.title: Stable steam output
benefits.description: Minimizes boiler excursions via closed-loop control.

benefits.title: Fuel savings
benefits.description: Optimized fuel-to-steam ratio over manual operation.

benefits.title: Operator support
benefits.description: SPC dashboards reduce cognitive load on shift teams.

research.problemStatement: Biopower boiler operations rely on manual adjustments that lead to suboptimal fuel-to-steam ratios and process variability.
objectives: Reduce specific fuel consumption by ≥3% across target boilers
Stabilize steam pressure within ±2% of setpoint
Provide SPC visibility with ≥99.5% dashboard uptime
research.scope: Two biopower boilers at a reference mill, covering fuel feed, combustion air, and steam drum control loops over a 24-month observation window.

approach.description: Closed-loop APC with statistical process control benchmarking against manual operation baselines.

phases.name: Measure
activities: Data quality audit on PI tags

sources.name: OSIsoft PI Historian
sources.description: Fuel feed, combustion air, drum level, steam flow at 1-second resolution.

sources.name: AVEVA APC Signals
sources.description: APC move plans and control limits.

dataCollection.volume: ≈1.2 TB historian data per year per boiler

analysisMethod.primary: Statistical Process Control (SPC) with capability indices

validation.method: A/B testing — APC-controlled vs manual shifts over 6 months

research.ethicsAndGovernance: Change management per site MOC. All deployments logged in controller audit trail.

title: Data Management Tool
subtitle: Enterprise Lakehouse — Raw, Silver, Gold
description: Medallion lakehouse unifying SAP, PI, satellite, and factory data into a governed single source of truth.

benefits.title: Single source of truth
benefits.description: Deduplicated, governed Gold Zone for analytics.

benefits.title: Faster reports
benefits.description: Dashboards refresh in minutes, not hours.

benefits.title: Traceable lineage
benefits.description: End-to-end lineage from source to KPI.

metricNote: Coverage scaled progressively BU by BU.

research.problemStatement: Enterprise data is siloed across SAP, PI, satellite, and factory systems with no single source of truth, blocking downstream AI workloads.
objectives: Land all 9 products into a Gold Zone
research.scope: Enterprise-wide ingestion and curation across 4 source families, delivered as a medallion lakehouse.

approach.description: Medallion lakehouse (Raw → Silver → Gold) with automated data quality gates.

analysisMethod.primary: Dimensional modeling for Gold KPI marts

validation.method: Progressive rollout BU by BU with reconciliation to source systems
validation.baseline: Source system truth + prior reporting extracts

title: Agentic AI
subtitle: Multi-LLM Orchestration for Knowledge Work
description: LangChain + n8n orchestration automating repetitive knowledge work across operations, procurement, and reporting.

benefits.title: FTE leverage
benefits.description: Frees analysts from repetitive lookups and report prep.

benefits.title: Consistent answers
benefits.description: RAG grounds responses in Gold Zone data.

benefits.title: Model-agnostic
benefits.description: Evaluation framework picks the right LLM per task.

metricNote: Pilots across 3 workflows; scaling on outcome.

research.problemStatement: 12+ FTEs engaged in repetitive knowledge work with high variance in output quality.
research.scope: Three pilot workflows: invoice-match inquiries, product documentation QA, and operations reporting.

approach.description: Benchmark 4 LLM classes across workflows with RAG and human baseline.

dataCollection.volume: Thousands of documents + millions of transactions

analysisMethod.primary: A/B testing AI vs manual per workflow

research.ethicsAndGovernance: All agent actions logged; destructive actions require human approval.

title: Precision Farming
subtitle: Geospatial Analytics for Yield Optimization
description: Satellite-guided farm intelligence translating NDVI zones into variable-rate input prescriptions.

benefits.title: Data-driven planting
benefits.description: Decisions based on NDVI and soil instead of intuition.

benefits.title: Input efficiency
benefits.description: ~15% fertilizer reduction through VRT.

benefits.title: Scalable
benefits.description: Covers millions of rai through satellite coverage.

metricNote: Uplift measured against neighboring control plots.

research.problemStatement: Planting decisions rely on experience rather than data, leaving yield below agronomic potential.
research.scope: Pilot fields across 3 regions, 18 months with seasonal controls.

approach.description: NDVI-driven zone mapping feeding VRT prescriptions and closed-loop yield feedback.

validation.method: Controlled field trials — data-driven vs traditional

title: Cane Volume Prediction
subtitle: LSTM + XGBoost Yield Forecasting
description: Season-ahead cane volume forecasting combining UAV imagery, weather, and planting calendar into an ensemble model.

benefits.title: Better sourcing
benefits.description: Mill scheduling aligned with forecasted volume.

benefits.title: Reduced waste
benefits.description: Cuts forecasting-driven logistics loss.

benefits.title: Explainable
benefits.description: Feature importances surface drivers per region.

research.problemStatement: Inaccurate volume forecasts cost an estimated ฿85M+/yr in waste and suboptimal milling schedules.
research.scope: Five years of yield history + current-season features; multi-mill catchment.

approach.description: LSTM + XGBoost ensemble with time-series aware validation.

title: Data + AI Governance
subtitle: ISO/IEC 42001 AI Management System
description: Policy, controls, and audit trails bringing MAI into alignment with ISO/IEC 42001 and enterprise risk management.

benefits.title: Risk-managed AI
benefits.description: Every model passes bias & impact review.

benefits.title: Auditable
benefits.description: End-to-end decision traceability.

benefits.title: Investor confidence
benefits.description: Credible ESG & compliance posture.

metricNote: Certification pursued with external ISO body.

research.problemStatement: AI models are deployed without systematic bias testing or audit trails, creating regulatory and reputational risk.
research.scope: All MAI AI/ML workloads and their upstream data products.

approach.description: Gap analysis vs ISO 42001 and AI RMF, followed by maturity-based implementation.

validation.method: Internal audit followed by external ISO certification body review

title: AI Sugarcane Weight
subtitle: Weighbridge Computer Vision + LLM Vision
description: Vision models replacing manual weighbridge grading with sub-second, auditable, fraud-resistant assessment.

benefits.title: Fraud resistance
benefits.description: Auditable imagery reduces dispute surface.

benefits.title: Throughput
benefits.description: Sub-second grading cuts queue time.

benefits.title: Consistency
benefits.description: Removes inter-grader variance.

metricNote: Field-trialed in blind comparison to human grading.

research.problemStatement: Manual weighbridge grading is slow, subjective, and vulnerable to fraud, causing payment disputes and throughput loss.
research.scope: Per-site weighbridge deployment with dual-GPU edge nodes.

approach.description: YOLO detection fused with LLM Vision for descriptive grading.

validation.method: Confusion matrix analysis + field trial comparison to human grading

title: AI Sugarcane Dump Station
subtitle: Dump Inspection + Quality Regression
description: Multi-view dump station vision models estimating CCS, fiber, and trash to reduce spoilage and payment disputes.

benefits.title: Consistent quality
benefits.description: Removes inter-inspector variance.

benefits.title: Less spoilage
benefits.description: Flags borderline loads sooner.

benefits.title: Solution package
benefits.description: Pre-configured for rapid site install.

metricNote: Blind comparison — AI vs lab vs human inspector.

research.problemStatement: Manual dump inspection produces inconsistent quality readings, causing spoilage and payment disputes.
objectives: R² ≥0.85 for quality regression vs lab
research.scope: Dump station cameras (top + side view) with quality lab reconciliation.

validation.method: Blind comparison — AI vs lab vs human

title: AI APC Own Build
subtitle: In-House Ensemble ML vs Vendor APC
description: Head-to-head experiment: can an in-house ensemble match vendor APC and eliminate recurring licensing cost?

benefits.title: Cost elimination
benefits.description: Potential to remove recurring vendor licensing.

benefits.title: IP retention
benefits.description: Models owned by MitrPhol.

benefits.title: Data-informed decision
benefits.description: Produces evidence either way.

metricNote: Success criterion is rigorous equivalence — not novelty.

research.problemStatement: Vendor APC costs ฿45M/yr in licensing. Open question: can an in-house ML ensemble match its performance?
research.scope: Same plant, same sensors as #1; alternating control periods over 6 months.

approach.description: Custom ML ensemble benchmarked head-to-head against vendor APC.

validation.method: Head-to-head same plant, alternating control periods

research.ethicsAndGovernance: Trial governed by site MOC. Safety envelope enforced at DCS layer — never at ML layer alone.
